items.summary: KRONIČNA upala može uzrokovati ozbiljne bolesti.

items.title: Nakon samo jedne kišne noći puževi mogu potpuno opustošiti vrt - stručnjaci otkrili kako to spriječiti
items.summary: Malo koji vrtni problem izaziva toliko frustracije kao puževi. Dovoljna je samo jedna kišna noć da nestanu mlade sadnice salate, a oštećene budu i jag

items.title: Iznenađujuće namirnice koje uzrokuju vjetrove i nadutost
items.summary: VJETROVI su normalan dio probave, no mogu ih pojačati i neočekivane namirnice.

items.title: These tiny holes could change how the world cleans water
items.summary: A new nature-inspired membrane uses perfectly uniform one-nanometer pores to filter molecules with remarkable precision. The technology could transform industries such as pharmaceuticals and textiles by reducing energy consumption, improving water reuse, and delivering separation performance far bey

items.title: Can fasting fight gum disease? Scientists find surprising link
items.summary: A low-calorie fasting-style diet significantly reduced inflammation linked to gum disease in a small clinical study. The findings suggest that what people eat may influence gum health almost as much as what they do with a toothbrush.

items.title: Scientists discover a surprising cancer link to Alzheimer’s disease
items.summary: Researchers discovered that mutations linked to blood cancers may help trigger Alzheimer’s disease by creating overly inflammatory immune cells in the brain. The unexpected finding could lead to new blood-based screening methods and potential treatments borrowed from cancer medicine.

items.title: Stanford scientists regrow lost cartilage and reverse arthritis in major breakthrough
items.summary: A new treatment that blocks an aging-related protein restored lost cartilage in old mice and helped prevent arthritis after knee injuries. Human cartilage samples showed similar signs of regeneration, raising hopes for a future drug that could repair joints instead of replacing them.
